items.title: useState and snapshots: verified implementation facet
items.prompt: Treat render state as a snapshot and use updater functions for queued changes based on prior state. Build a bounded artifact demonstrating state snapshot updated through setter; the locked browser verifier checks observable structure, behavior, or computed presentation.
